query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.icon, c.description FROM categories c WHERE c.name LIKE '%Saud%' OR c.name LIKE '%Vegan%' OR c.name LIKE '%Açaí%' OR c.name LIKE '%Acai%'; SELECT e.id, e.name, e.slug FROM establishments e WHERE e.categoryId IN (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name LIKE '%Saud%') ORDER BY e.name LIMIT 100;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.slug, c.icon, c.description FROM categories c WHERE c.name LIKE '%Saud%' OR c.name LIKE '%Vegan%' OR c.name LIKE '%Açaí%' OR c.name LIKE '%Acai%'; SELECT e.id, e.name, e.slug FROM establishments e WHERE e.categoryId IN (SELECT id FROM categories WHERE name LIKE '%Saud%') ORDER BY e.name LIMIT 100;
